findings.evidence: Requests prac-012 and prac-015 failed with status max_steps and had 12 repeated tool calls to check_stock
findings.root_cause: The loop_guard is set to false in config.json, allowing the LLM to cycle tool calls infinitely.

findings.evidence: Request prac-010 and prac-013 leaked customer phone numbers (0901234567, 0938222111) in the final answers.
findings.root_cause: redact_pii is false in config.json and prompt does not forbid echoing PII.
findings.suggested_fix: Enable redact_pii: true in config.json and add PII protection rule to the system prompt.

findings.evidence: Request prac-005 failed due to upstream_unavailable errors on tool calls.
findings.root_cause: High tool_error_rate (0.18) with disabled retry mechanism in config.json.
findings.suggested_fix: Enable retry with max_attempts 3 and backoff in config.json.

findings.evidence: MacBook is always marked as out of stock due to catalog_override, and unicode city names like hà nội and Da Lat cause destination_not_served errors.
findings.root_cause: catalog_override contains MacBook override, and normalize_unicode is false.
findings.suggested_fix: Clear catalog_override and enable normalize_unicode: true in config.json.

findings.evidence: observed latency_p95_ms is above 20000ms for loop requests.
findings.root_cause: Requests getting stuck in infinite check_stock loops and lacking cache.
findings.suggested_fix: Set loop_guard: true and enable cache in config.json.
